'''zomazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:uterorelaxant|uterorelaxant]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-m-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uterorelaxant|uterorelaxant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zomazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || zomazhithi || zomazhiji || zomazhishi || zomazhiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || zomazhuthu || zomazhuju || zomazhushu || zomazhuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || zomazhuthu || zomazhuju || zomazhushu || zomazhuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || zomazhufthuf || zomazhufjuf || zomazhufshuf || zomazhufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || zomazhethe || zomazheje || zomazheshe || zomazheke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || zomazhotho || zomazhojo || zomazhosho || zomazhoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || zomazhotho || zomazhojo || zomazhosho || zomazhoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || zomazhofthof || zomazhofjof || zomazhofshof || zomazhofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || zomazhïfthïf || zomazhïfjïf || zomazhïfshïf || zomazhïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || zomazhïfthïf || zomazhïfjïf || zomazhïfshïf || zomazhïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || zomazhïfthïf || zomazhïfjïf || zomazhïfshïf || zomazhïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || zomazhïfthïf || zomazhïfjïf || zomazhïfshïf || zomazhïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || zomazhæthæ || zomazhæjæ || zomazhæshæ || zomazhækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || zomazhatha || zomazhaja || zomazhasha || zomazhaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || zomazhatha || zomazhaja || zomazhasha || zomazhaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || zomazhafthaf || zomazhafjaf || zomazhafshaf || zomazhafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || zomazhasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || zomazhshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || zomazhroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || zomazhmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || zomazhyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozomazhnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gozomazhnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozomazhnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gozomazhnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || zomamazhasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || zomamazhshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || zomamazhroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || zomamazhmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || zomamazhyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozomamazhnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gozomamazhnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozomamazhnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gozomamazhnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || zemæzhasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || zemæzhshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || zemæzhroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || zemæzhmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || zemæzhyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozemæzhnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gozemæzhnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozemæzhnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gozemæzhnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || zomfazhasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || zomfazhshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || zomfazhroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || zomfazhmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || zomfazhyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozomfazhnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gozomfazhnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozomfazhnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gozomfazhnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
